---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new flag, capability, or behaviour change
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What you're trying to do that memorialiste can't do today, or does awkwardly. Concrete scenario, not abstract wishlist. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like memorialiste to do. New flag? New CLI command? New manifest field? Different default? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you've tried, or simpler approaches you ruled out and why. -->

## Constraints / non-goals

<!-- What this feature should NOT do. Helps scope the change. -->

## Example usage

<!-- A snippet showing how the feature would be used, even if pseudo. -->

```sh
memorialiste --your-new-flag value ...
```

```yaml
# or a manifest example
docs:
  - path: ...
    your_new_field: ...
```

## Impact on existing users

<!-- Backward compatibility considerations. Does this change any defaults? Break any current workflow? -->
